name: node-is-path-inside
title: node-is-path-inside
summary: Check if a path is inside another path
description:
Check if a path is inside another path
When checked against same path given for both arguments it retruns false.
.
Node.js library to check if a path is inside another path given.
For example "isPathInside('a/b/c', 'a/b/c');" given then it return false.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-is-path-inside because Check if a path is inside another path.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-is-path-inside as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-is-path-inside with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-is-path-inside --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
